title: The Pre-Wedding Photo Shoot (A Full Circus)

sentences.en: My aunt employed a professional photographer for a pre-wedding photo shoot, and the whole family was invited, whether we wanted to pose or not.
sentences.zh: 我姑姑請了一位專業攝影師來拍婚紗照，全家人都被邀請入鏡，不管我們想不想擺姿勢。

sentences.en: The shoot started at three pm sharp at a garden studio, chosen mainly because it was convenient for both families to reach.
sentences.zh: 拍攝下午三點整在一間花園攝影棚準時開始，選這裡主要是因為對雙方家庭來說都很方便。

sentences.en: The photographer explained one basic principle right away: relax your shoulders, or the camera lens sees every bit of tension.
sentences.zh: 攝影師一開始就解釋了一個基本原則：放鬆肩膀，否則鏡頭會拍出每一絲緊繃。

sentences.en: He used his latest camera, which had a feature that took ten photos per second, just in case someone blinked and shut their eyes.
sentences.zh: 他用了他最新款的相機，有一個每秒能拍十張的功能，以防有人眨眼閉上眼睛。

sentences.en: My aunt looked genuinely stunning, and even Sophia admitted her beauty that afternoon was hard to put into words.
sentences.zh: 我姑姑那天下午真的美極了，連 Sophia 都承認她的美難以用言語形容。

sentences.en: The dress material caught the light beautifully, though my aunt admitted it made walking on the grass slightly harder than expected.
sentences.zh: 禮服的布料在光線下美得驚人，不過我姑姑坦承這讓她走在草地上比想像中還難走。

sentences.en: William, one of the youngest kids there, nearly slipped on the wet grass while running toward his future uncle for a photo.
sentences.zh: William 是那裡最小的孩子之一，衝去找他未來的姑丈拍照時差點在濕草地上滑倒。

sentences.en: The photographer patiently tried to teach him to stand still, but William's idea of a "cute pose" mostly involved flexing like a tiny superhero.
sentences.zh: 攝影師很有耐心地教他站好，但 William 心目中的「可愛姿勢」大多是像個迷你超級英雄一樣秀肌肉。

sentences.en: For one photo, the whole family stood beside a lone tree at the center of the garden, with the sun shining brightly above us.
sentences.zh: 有一張照片，全家人站在花園中央一棵孤獨的樹旁，陽光在我們頭上明亮地照著。

sentences.en: The photographer kept switching between a wide shot and a medium shot, saying each angle told a slightly different story about the family.
sentences.zh: 攝影師不斷在遠景跟中景之間切換，說每個角度都能講出這個家庭稍微不同的故事。

sentences.en: Bernice, who came along as an honorary family member, forgot she was not actually supposed to be in every single photo, and nobody had the heart to stop her.
sentences.zh: 以榮譽家庭成員身份跟來的 Bernice，忘了自己其實不是每一張照片都該入鏡，但沒有人狠得下心阻止她。

sentences.en: My uncle joked that although this was a small photo shoot, it felt like the whole event was, therefore, technically a small production of its own.
sentences.zh: 我叔叔開玩笑說，雖然這只是個小小的拍攝，因此嚴格來說整個活動其實也算是它自己的一場小型製作。

sentences.en: By the latter half of the shoot, everyone was a little tired, and even the youths in the family had run out of patience for smiling on command.
sentences.zh: 拍攝進行到後半段，大家都有點累了，就連家裡的年輕人也對配合微笑用完了耐心。

sentences.en: The staff serving cold drinks nearby said, based on their experience, most families win the battle against tiredness once snacks appear.
sentences.zh: 在旁邊供應冷飲的工作人員說，根據他們的經驗，一旦點心出現，大部分家庭都能贏過疲憊的挑戰。

sentences.en: They were completely right; the moment snacks arrived, every kid, teen, man, and woman in the family suddenly found fresh energy for a few more photos.
sentences.zh: 他們說得完全正確；點心一到，家裡不管是小孩、青少年、男人還是女人，突然都又找到力氣多拍幾張照片。

sentences.en: By the end, the photographer said he had captured, without a doubt, one of the most genuinely happy families he had shot all year.
sentences.zh: 拍攝結束時，攝影師說毫無疑問，這是他今年拍過最真心快樂的家庭之一。

quiz.question: What feature does the photographer's latest camera have?
options: It takes ten photos per second.
It works only in black and white.

quiz.question: What almost happens to William on the wet grass?
options: He nearly slips while running for a photo.

quiz.question: What finally gives the tired family fresh energy for more photos?
options: A short break to sit down.
